response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role requires a Director-level IC with ~15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 10-13 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI platforms or products at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no evidence of executive-level technical leadership or advising strategic customers at the scale this Principal role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: Falls short of the 15-year experience bar and lacks Director/Principal-level scope
No recognized AI products, platforms, or publications demonstrating AI expertise
No evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product strategy at scale

key_factors.factor: Insufficient seniority for Director-level IC role
Lacks recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
